docs.title: DiversityLens
docs.text: Minimal placeholder page. We will document the pipeline, modules and usage here.

docs.title: src.dataset_loader
docs.text: This module is responsible for searching and listing all relevant files(images/videos) in a given dataset directory. In will be used as the first step in order to create a demopgraphic analysis.

docs.title: Loader
docs.text: This class' functions can be used to manipulate the dataset.

docs.title: src.face_detector
docs.text: This module is responsible for detecting human faces within a given dataset, which may include both images and videos.

docs.title: detect_faces(path)
docs.text: This fuction will detect the faces of people in images/videos

docs.title: src.demographic_estimator
docs.text: This module is responsible for estimating demographic attributes (age, gender, and ethnicity) for detected faces, using predictions from a pretrained model.

docs.title: src.analyzer
docs.text: This module is responsible for creating statistical analysis on the demographic predictions of a given dataset.
